name: Is the Casino Open?
description: Developed a full-stack application that bridges the gap between social media sentiment and real-time market data, allowing users to track trending assets and engage with the market through a gamified interface. This was a fun project that is completely useless. I wanted to capture the same gambling culture as WallStreetBets where individual would randomly "YOLO" their savings on trending stocks.

images.alt: is the casino open - live charts
